title: Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Shahapur and Bhiwandi taluka of Thane district and Wada taluka of Palghar district.
overview.description: The Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary is located in Shahapur and Bhiwandi taluka of Thane district and Wada taluka of Palghar district. The sanctuary is spread over an area of 320 km2. This sanctuary is spread around the catchment area of Tansa, Vaitarna and Modak Sagar lakes which are major source of water to the Mumbai, Thane and Bhiwandi cities. There are about 60 villages in the sanctuary area.

topPlaces.name: Tansa Dam
topPlaces.description: Tansa dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Tansa river near Mumbai, Thane district in the state of Maharashtra in India. The dam is one of the seven sources of drinking water to the city of Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Taharpur, Thane
topPlaces.description: Taharpur is a village in Thane district of Maharashtra State, India. Aghai is a nearby village.

topPlaces.name: Mahuli
topPlaces.description: Mahuli is an hill fort based in the Indian state of Maharashtra, covering about 6km. It is approximately 75km north-east of Mumbai in the 421601 postcode.

topPlaces.name: Pundhe
topPlaces.description: Pundhe is a small village in Shahapur taluka of Thane district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on Mumbai Nashik Express Way.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tansa Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tansa Dam, Taharpur, Thane, Mahuli, Pundhe.
